title: SCP-610, Flesh that Hates
description: A grotesque flesh infection that spreads across the world, mutating victims into aggressive abominations and forming a hostile hive.
body:
The Flesh that Hates adds a new entity. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-610, also known as the Flesh that Hates.


SCP-610 is a large-scale infection system. The anomaly manifests as living flesh that spreads across terrain, infects entities, and evolves into numerous hostile lifeforms. SCP-610 slowly overtakes the environment, transforming blocks, creatures, and entire areas into a living hive. Living SCP-610 Instances are hostile, aggressive, twisted, flesh creatures that attack almost anything. Those Entities will also infect other targets to let the population of SCP-610 grow. Fire can slow its growth, but eliminating or containing the source of the infection is the only way to stop it permanently, before it overruns your world.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)

● Concept Designs made by xXYoLoDeXx

[https://youtube.com/@xxyolodeytxx?si=Js0S313UVTaCV36P](https://youtube.com/@xxyolodeytxx?si=Js0S313UVTaCV36P)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► How can I locate SCP-610 Instances?

You can locate SCP-610 Instances with the new Item called "Flesh Detector". This Item will locate SCP-610 Instances within 150 blocks, and displays a message if an Instance have been found or not.


► How can I turn off the Growth of Flesh Blocks?

You can turn off the growth of Flesh Blocks by setting the gamerule "enableFleshGrow" to false.

► How can I turn off the Call of the Hive effect?

You can turn off the Call of the Hive effect by setting the gamerule "disableCallOfTheHive" to false.

► Can I contain SCP-610?

Yes, you can contain SCP-610! Usually, the infection starts with Infected Pillagers that only spawn if there isn't an SCP-610-6 in the world. If they die, they have a 4% chance spawning a small SCP-610-6 Instance when killed by a player, and a 20% chance when killed by mobs.

The SCP-610-6 Instance will grow into a big SCP-610-6 Instance usually within two days. To contain it, build a 8x9x8 Box out of blocks that cannot be infected with SCP-610-6.

For example: Any concrete or stone block.

DO NOT build the box with too much space, since the SCP-610-6 instances will spawn other SCP-610 Instances nearby, if there is a flesh in a 6 block distance.

► Which Blocks can be infected by SCP-610?

Blocks can be infected by SCP-610. Those Blocks will rot if there isn't an SCP-610-6 instance within specific reach. You can use fire to burn the upper blocks, but the best way to get rid of them, is by letting them rot.

Blocks that can be infected by SCP-610:

>Any Grass Blocks
>Any Dirt Blocks
>Any Sand Blocks
>Clay
>Gravel
>Any Leave Blocks
>Any Log Blocks
>Any Wooden Blocks

► How can I get rid of the flesh Infection blocks?

To get rid of the flesh blocks, kill all SCP-610-6, especially the big ones. After killing them, flesh blocks will rot.

You can also use fire, but this only burns the upper layer.

► Why does my game starts to lag if there are a lot of flesh blocks?

The Flesh Blocks use ticks to infect other blocks, catch fire or rot if there isn't an SCP-610-6 Instance within specific reach. If there is a big area made out of Flesh blocks, the game could start to lag and it isn't recommended to just let the flesh infect your world.

► What does the Call of the Hive do?

Call of the Hive is a new effect given by SCP-610 Instances when they die or being too close to an SCP-610-6 Instance.

If an Entity has the Call of the Hive effect, all nearby SCP-610 Instances within 40 blocks will target the victim.

► What does the Flesh Infection do?

The Flesh Infection is a new effect given by SCP-610 Attacks.


Stage 1:

Take 1 Damage With 0.05%

Increase 1 Hunger With 0.05%


Stage 2:

Weakness I

Overlay starts getting Red

Removal of Saturation and Resistance

Sweat Particles

Take 1 Damage With 0.09%

Increase 1 Hunger With 0.08%


Stage 3:

Weakness I

Slowness II

Overlay increases getting Red

Removal of Saturation, Absorption, Speed, Haste and Resistance

Sweat Particles

Take 1 Damage With 0.5%

Increase 1 Hunger With 0.1%


Stage 4:

Weakness II

Slowness III

Overlay increases getting Red

Removal of Saturation, Absorption, Speed, Haste, Regeneration and Resistance

Sweat Particles

Take 1 Damage With 3%

Increase 1 Hunger With 0.5%


Stage 5:

Death

Die with Flesh Infection:
Humanoid Mobs / Players: SCP-610-1 Spawns
Animal Mobs: SCP-610-2 Spawns

► Where does SCP-610 Instances spawn?

SCP-610 Instances only spawn if a mob dies to the Flesh Infection or is killed by an SCP-610 Instance or Infected Pillager. SCP-610 Instances can also be summoned by SCP-610-6 Instances.

Infected Pillagers can spawn on the overworld surface like a normal monster after 3 days passed. However, there can only be a few instances of SCP-610 in one area.

</details>



![SCP-610](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68af59093fb5cf77c74a91973028cf15fb713293.png)

SCP-610 is a hostile infection that manifests as living flesh, capable of spreading across terrain and living beings alike. Once introduced into the world, it slowly overtakes its surroundings, corrupting blocks, creatures, and entire regions into a unified hive. Victims exposed to SCP-610 may suffer from Flesh Infection, a progressive condition that weakens and kills the host, transforming them into new SCP-610 Instance. Those Instances can also mutate into more brutal monsters. These manifestations range from fast, fragile hunters to massive, heavily armored brutes, all acting in coordination. At the core of SCP-610 infestations are Incubators, pulsating flesh growths that spread corruption, strengthen nearby entities, and give rise to new mutations. As long as Incubators remain active, the flesh continues to grow and adapt. Although SCP-610 is highly vulnerable to fire. 

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
